Claw of Phara Dar  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 21
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Yaulp IV (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 4.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 21
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 58

QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2002 at 9:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250292033
91 posts
Back in the day, Phara Dar was one helluva **** (and still is, mind you), hits for 800 and AE mezzes. The point is though, there were very few, if any, 1h weps with the dmg and dly within 8 of each other, so this one is pretty damn close. Plus, it procs Yaulp IV, which I suppose is something like 30-40str and ac or something, dun quote me on that though, im not a pal or cler, just a lowly monk :P

Vel
Damn Chardok Pipe!!!
52nd Monk of the Lost Circle

▲ Page top
RE: .....
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2002 at 1:33 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756515749
112 posts
Not exactly a mez... PD's AE is 900 DD + 9 second stun... still pretty rough.

The proc is ac/atk/str, as I understand it, and is actually pretty decent. Its just got a sad ratio, especially for offhand :/

-bort

# Mar 06 2002 at 5:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750257673
Scholar
51 posts
She's a nasty bugger. If you target her and type one of the gender-return commands (ie %o) you'll find out that Phara Dar is in fact a female..... which makes sense since she can make a grown man cry with her incredibly sexy claws (Hurts so good).
